title: Beautiful Campfires
description: Now the appearance of the campfire will depend on the wood used to make it!
body:
Now, the appearance of the bonfires will depend on the wood used to make them, i.e. if you use birch wood blocks to make them, their appearance will be birch themed! And the same will happen with the rest of the wood in the game, and even with birch wood.

Ready to play with your friends on the best hosting?

I recommend Bisect Hosting for playing with friends because of their high-quality, lag-free servers. You can install any CurseForge modpack or your custom mods without errors. Plus, their support is available 24/7 to help with any issues. Use my code to get a 25% discount on your purchase.

Now each of the woods in the game will have its own campfire, characteristic of its color! And of course, of each of the types of fire!

Of course, the recipes have been somewhat modified, and the original campfire can only be made with oak wood, something that we believe now makes more sense, as it is more faithful to its appearance. Also, we are not going to add any other variants, we will only keep variants with wood look, and always being faithful to the campfire style.
